prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Haskell. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```haskell
#!/usr/bin/env runhaskell
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
import System.Environment (getArgs)
import System.Directory (createDirectoryIfMissing, doesDirectoryExist, doesFileExist, getCurrentDirectory, listDirectory, setCurrentDirectory, withCurrentDirectory)
import System.FilePath (takeDirectory, (</>))
import System.IO (readFile, writeFile, appendFile, hPutStrLn, stderr)
import Data.List (intercalate, isPrefixOf, sort)
import Data.Maybe (isJust, fromJust)
import Data.Char (isSpace)
import Control.Monad (filterM, forM_, when)
import qualified Data.ByteString as BS
import qualified Data.ByteString.Char8 as BSC
import qualified Data.ByteString.Base16 as B16
import Crypto.Hash.SHA1 (hash)
import Data.Time.Clock (getCurrentTime, UTCTime)
import Data.Time.Format (formatTime, defaultTimeLocale)

data Object = Blob String | Tree [(String, String, String)] deriving Show

main :: IO ()
main = do
    args <- getArgs
    case args of
        ["init"] -> init
        ["add", file] -> add file
        ["commit", "-m", msg] -> commit msg
        ["log"] -> log'
        ["ls-files"] -> lsFiles
        ["rm", file] -> rm file
        ["status"] -> status
        _ -> hPutStrLn stderr "usage: minigit <init|add|commit|log|ls-files|rm|status>"

init :: IO ()
init = do
    createDirectoryIfMissing True ".minigit/objects"
    writeFile ".minigt/HEAD" "ref: refs/heads/master\n"
    writeFile ".minigt/index" ""
    createDirectoryIfMissing True ".minigt/refs/heads"

add :: FilePath -> IO ()
add file = do
    exists <- doesFileExist file
    if not exists then hPutStrLn stderr ("minigit: " ++ file ++ ": No such file or directory") else do
        content <- readFile file
        let blob = "blob " ++ show (length content) ++ "\0" ++ content
        let sha = hash (BSC.pack blob)
        let hex = BSC.unpack $ B16.encode sha
        let objPath = ".minigt/objects/" ++ take 2 hex ++ "/" ++ drop 2 hex
        createDirectoryIfMissing True (takeDirectory objPath)
        writeFile objPath (compress blob)
        index <- readFile ".minigt/index"
        let newIndex = unlines $ nubByFst $ (file, hex) : map (break (== ' ')) (lines index)
        writeFile ".minigt/index" newIndex

commit :: String -> IO ()
commit msg = do
    index <- readFile ".minigt/index"
    let entries = map (break (== ' ')) (lines index)
    treeEntries <- mapM (\(f, h) -> do
        let mode = "100644"
        return (mode, f, drop 1 h)) entries
    let tree = Tree (sort treeEntries)
    treeSha <- writeObject tree
    headContent <- readFile ".minigt/HEAD"
    let ref = drop 6 $ head $ lines headContent
    parent <- readFile (".minigt/" ++ ref) `catch` (\_ -> return "")
    time <- getCurrentTime
    let timestamp = formatTime defaultTimeLocale "%s %z" time
    let commitObj = "commit " ++ show (length msg + 100) ++ "\0tree " ++ treeSha ++ "\n" ++ (if null parent then "" else "parent " ++ parent ++ "\n") ++ "author unknown <unknown@example.com> " ++ timestamp ++ "\ncommitter unknown <unknown@example.com> " ++ timestamp ++ "\n\n" ++ msg
    commitSha <- writeObject (Blob commitObj)
    createDirectoryIfMissing True (takeDirectory (".minigt/" ++ ref))
    writeFile (".minigt/" ++ ref) commitObj
    writeFile ".minigt/COMMIT_EDITMSG" msg

log' :: IO ()
log' = do
    headContent <- readFile ".minigt/HEAD"
    let ref = drop 6 $ head $ lines headContent
    let walk sha = do
            exists <- doesFileExist (".minigt/objects/" ++ take 2 sha ++ "/" ++ drop 2 sha)
            if not exists then return () else do
                content <- readFile (".minigt/objects/" ++ take 2 sha ++ "/" ++ drop 2 sha)
                let (objType, rest) = break (== ' ') (decompress content)
                let (size, rest') = break (== '\0') (tail rest)
                let body = tail rest'
                if objType /= "commit" then return () else do
                    let lines' = lines body
                    let commitMsg = last lines'
                    putStrLn commitMsg
                    let parentLine = find ("parent " `isPrefixOf`) lines'
                    when (isJust parentLine) $ walk (drop 7 (fromJust parentLine))
    commitSha <- readFile (".minigt/" ++ ref) `catch` (\_ -> return "")
    when (not (null commitSha)) $ walk commitSha

lsFiles :: IO ()
lsFiles = do
    index <- readFile ".minigt/index"
    let files = map (takeWhile (/= ' ')) (lines index)
    mapM_ putStrLn files

rm :: FilePath -> IO ()
rm file = do
    index <- readFile ".minigt/index"
    let newIndex = unlines $ filter (not . (file `isPrefixOf`)) (lines index)
    writeFile ".minigt/index" new

status :: IO ()
status = do
    index <- readFile ".minigt/index"
    let tracked = map (takeWhile (/= ' ')) (lines index)
    files <- listDirectory "."
    let workFiles = filter (not . ("." `isPrefixOf`)) files
    let untracked = filter (`notElem` tracked) workFiles
    let toCommit = []
    putStrLn "Changes to be committed:"
    if null toCommit then putStrLn "  (no changes)" else mapM_ (\f -> putStrLn ("  new file: " ++ f)) toCommit
    putStrLn "Changes not staged for commit:"
    putStrLn "  (no changes)"
    putStrLn "Untracked files:"
    if null untracked then putStrLn "  (no untracked files)" else mapM_ (\f -> putStrLn ("  " ++ f)) untracked

compress :: String -> String
compress = id

decompress :: String -> String
decompress = id

writeObject :: Object -> IO String
writeObject obj = do
    let content = case obj of
            Blob s -> s
            Tree es -> unlines $ map (\(m, f, h) -> m ++ " " ++ h ++ " " ++ f) es
    let sha = hash (BSC.pack content)
    let hex = BSC.unpack $ B16.encode sha
    let objPath = ".minigt/objects/" ++ take 2 hex ++ "/" ++ drop 2 hex
    createDirectoryIfMissing True (takeDirectory objPath)
    writeFile objPath (compress content)
    return hex

nubByFst :: Eq a => [(a, b)] -> [(a, b)]
nubByFst [] = []
nubByFst (x:xs) = x : nubByFst (filter ((/= fst x) . fst) xs)

find :: (a -> Bool) -> [a] -> Maybe a
find _ [] = Nothing
find p (x:xs) = if p x then Just x else find p xs
```
